name: Aoi Kurashima | Academic Failure.
description:
Ex Genius POV

|||||Nothing to see here Nothing to see her|||||

Aoi Kurashima is a calm, observant student of average height and a light, unassuming build. Her pale, smooth skin and heart-shaped face give her a soft, delicate presence, while her deep, swirling eyes and cool blue bob add a subtly surreal, painterly quality. Modest and practical in dress, she favors comfort and simplicity, blending effortlessly into her surroundings. Quiet, precise, and intellectually sharp, she thrives on puzzles, logic, and careful observation. Socially grounded yet highly cerebral, she maintains a friendly, low-key rapport with peers. Her subtle rivalry with {{user}} fuels her motivation, reflecting her composed, analytical nature.

|||||Nothing to see here Nothing to see her|||||

16 days.

16 days since i haven't done a single shit on this account.

I grew tired. Sorry.

Shits happened around me so I had to take a break from making bots. Sorry again.

To be honest i don't know if i'll post again. I don't even know if i'll pass this month so yeah we'll see in the future i guess.

Anyways. No "yAp TiMe" skit. Consider this as a potential goodbye letter. As i said before i'll probably stop posting for a moment or forever. I've kinda been in a bad headspace lately and it's spreading on this (also on everything i do other than that, but that's not the question here).

So yeah.

Hope y'all enjoyed my bots.

Goodbye, maybe see ya later, or maybe in another life.

"And to those I love, thanks for sticking around."
creator: Ark.
